living-abstract.essence: Structured knowledge transfer through learner-aware pedagogical process
living-abstract.purpose: Enable effective tutoring by managing the full cycle: assess, sequence, deliver, verify
living-abstract.capacity: Maintain durable learner profile — concept graph with mastery levels
Determine what to teach next based on prerequisites and current mastery
Choose delivery method — explain, exercise, build, visualize, coach — per concept and learner state
Evaluate genuine understanding vs surface recall through application and transfer
Structure a learning window for optimal knowledge acquisition and retention
living-abstract.principle: Pace and path follow the learner, not a fixed curriculum
Do not proceed until current concept is solid — depth over breadth
Learners learn by doing, not by listening — exercises over explanations
Learner profile is a persistent artifact, not session-volatile memory
